title: Dawn Derr
compiled_truth: Dawn Derr is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-07-07 to 2001-10-30), Dawn Derr sent 12 and received 17 emails, totalling 29 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tracy Geaccone](people/tracy-geaccone) (9), [Terry West](people/terry-west) (6), [Faith Killen](people/faith-killen) (5), [Dana Lee](people/dana-lee) (5), [Rachel Massey](people/rachel-massey) (5).
